description: Configure local development so the Vite patient app can call relative /api/* paths without hard-coding staging URLs. Scope: add Vite dev server proxy options for API Gateway or local Lambda emulation; document required env vars; support cookies and same-origin mutation checks in local dev; avoid CORS drift between local and staging; provide a simple smoke command for local API connectivity. Acceptance criteria: running the Vite dev server lets onboarding/dashboard/billing calls use /api/*; auth session cookies work in local dev; README/runbook documents local options and known limitations.
title: Define local development proxy for Vite /api calls
